channel.title: Android on Elis Hirwing
channel.description: Recent content in Android on Elis Hirwing

item.title: Weechat Android SSH relay setup
item.description: Setting up the Weechat Android GitHub Play Store relay client over SSH can be a bit tricky and quite bad at giving useful error messages. So since I’m going through a re-setup of that I’m also writing down my notes here. Weechat configuration Type the following commands into Weechat. Placeholders such as {port} and {password} will be used here and later on. Suggested default port is 9000, but you need to chose something unique on your system.
